description: Expand the edit candidate form (Data Kandidat tab) to include ALL fields from the Form Responses 3 import. Currently only shows basic personal data and motivasi. Need to add sections for: additional personal info (kodeReferensi, kodeJob, kategoriKandidat, domisili, bidangKerja, health fields, passport, SIM), keluarga (4 members), pendidikan (SD/SMP/SMA/Univ), riwayat pekerjaan (4 entries), emergency contact, and additional document links.
steps: In src/app/admin/edit/[id]/page.js, expand the 'Data Kandidat' tab (activeTab === 'data') section
Add a new card section 'Informasi Referensi & Job' with fields: kodeReferensi, kodeJob, kategoriKandidat, domisili, bidangKerja
Expand 'Data Pribadi' card to include missing personal fields: dominanTangan, butaWarna, merokok, minumAlkohol, tato, penyakitBerat, alergi, hobi
Add a new card section 'Paspor & SIM' with fields: pernahKeJepang, memilikiPaspor, nomorPaspor, masaBerlakuPaspor, memilikiSim

Add a new card section 'Data Keluarga' that renders 4 family member entries. Each with fields: nama, hubungan, usia, pekerjaan, gaji, tinggalBersama. Use a nested handler (handleKeluargaChange) that updates the keluarga array in data state.

Add a new card section 'Riwayat Pendidikan' with subsections for SD (sdNama, sdMasuk, sdLulus), SMP (smpNama, smpMasuk, smpLulus), SMA (smaNama, smaMasuk, smaLulus, smaJurusan), Universitas (univNama, univMasuk, univLulus, univJurusan)

Add a new card section 'Riwayat Pekerjaan' that renders 4 work history entries. Each with fields: perusahaan, masuk, keluar, bidang, status, uraian. Use a nested handler (handlePekerjaanChange) that updates the pekerjaan array in data state.
Add a new card section 'Tentang Jepang & Bahasa' with fields: lamaInginTinggal, lamaBelajarBahasaJepang
Add a new card section 'Kontak Darurat' with fields: nomorDarurat, namaPemilikDarurat, hubunganDarurat
Add a new card section 'Promosi Diri' with a textarea for promosiDiri

Add a new card section 'Link Dokumen' (moved from certs tab or duplicated) with ALL document fields: pasPhoto, sertifikatBahasaJepang, videoJFT, sertifikatSSW, videoSSW, cvRirekisho, sertifikatSenmonkyuu, sertifikatSelesaiMagang

Ensure all new sections follow existing UI patterns: card class wrapper, form-label class for labels, input-field class for inputs, grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 layout where appropriate, textarea for long text fields
acceptance_criteria: The edit page Data Kandidat tab shows all sections: Informasi Referensi, Data Pribadi (expanded), Paspor & SIM, Data Keluarga (4 entries), Riwayat Pendidikan (SD/SMP/SMA/Univ), Riwayat Pekerjaan (4 entries), Tentang Jepang, Kontak Darurat, Promosi Diri, Link Dokumen
All fields from parseRow() in import/page.js are editable in the form
Array fields (keluarga, pekerjaan) properly update nested state
Saving works correctly - all new fields are persisted to Firestore
npm run build completes without errors
verification: Run `npm run build` and confirm no compilation errors
findings: Build passes cleanly. Edit page Data Kandidat tab now shows all fields from Form Responses 3. Page size grew from ~4KB to 6.73KB (First Load JS 220KB). Array handlers for keluarga and pekerjaan properly manage nested state updates.
